Scenario: Moderator can open and use the moderator panel
Preconditions: App installed in test subreddit; tester has mod permissions
Test Steps: 1) Open verification post 2) Click Open Moderator Panel 3) Switch all tabs
Expected Result: Panel loads state, tabs render, no permission errors for mod

Scenario: Non-moderator cannot perform moderator actions
Test Steps: 1) Open verification post as non-mod 2) Attempt moderator-only actions
Expected Result: Non-mod cannot access moderator actions; no privileged writes occur

Scenario: Refresh button reloads current state
Test Steps: 1) Click Refresh 2) Compare pending/storage counts to latest known state
Expected Result: State refreshes and UI updates without needing reload

Scenario: Create Verification Hub (NSFW) menu action creates post
Test Steps: 1) Open subreddit mod menu 2) Run Create Verification Hub (NSFW) 3) Provide title
Expected Result: NSFW custom post is created and opens successfully

Scenario: Purge Audit Log action blocks without confirmation text
Preconditions: Tester is moderator; audit entries exist
Test Steps: 1) Open subreddit mod menu 2) Run Purge Audit Log 3) Submit wrong confirmation
Expected Result: Action is rejected with confirm requirement; no entries removed

Scenario: Purge Audit Log days = 0 removes all audit entries for subreddit
Preconditions: Install setting set to 0; subreddit has audit entries
Test Steps: 1) Run Purge Audit Log with confirm 2) Re-open audit history view
Expected Result: All audit entries for that subreddit are removed

Scenario: Purge Audit Log days = N removes only entries older than N days
Preconditions: Install setting set to N>0; mixed-age audit entries exist
Test Steps: 1) Run Purge Audit Log with confirm 2) Re-check old vs recent entries
Expected Result: Only entries older than N days are removed; recent remain

Scenario: Purge Audit Log days validates non-negative whole numbers
Test Steps: 1) Try -1 2) Try 1.5 3) Try 7
Expected Result: Negative/non-integer rejected; integer >=0 accepted

Scenario: Purge Audit Log days is per installation
Test Steps: 1) Set different purge days in each subreddit install 2) Run purge in each
Expected Result: Each subreddit uses its own configured value

Scenario: Username filter narrows pending list
Test Steps: 1) Type partial username in pending filter 2) Clear input
Expected Result: List filters while typing and restores when cleared

Scenario: SLA filter All/<24h/24-72h/>72h works
Preconditions: Pending items exist across age buckets
Test Steps: 1) Click each SLA button 2) Observe visible cards/badges
Expected Result: Only matching age bucket items show for each filter

Scenario: Claim Pending locks reviewer ownership
Test Steps: 1) Click Claim on a pending item 2) Refresh
Expected Result: Item shows claimedBy/claimedAt and claim persists

Scenario: Unclaim Pending releases claim
Test Steps: 1) Click Unclaim 2) Refresh
Expected Result: Claim metadata is removed and item is available again

Scenario: Approve moves item out of pending and into approved history
Preconditions: Valid pending record exists; flair template configured
Test Steps: 1) Approve pending item 2) Check Pending and History > Approved
Expected Result: Item leaves pending and appears in approved results

Scenario: Approve is blocked when flair template ID is missing
Preconditions: Verification settings missing flair template ID
Test Steps: 1) Attempt approve action
Expected Result: Action is rejected with clear error message

Scenario: Deny requires a reason
Test Steps: 1) Open deny flow 2) Submit without reason 3) Submit with reason
Expected Result: Without reason blocked; with reason succeeds

Scenario: Deny with moderator notes stores/sends notes
Test Steps: 1) Deny with reason + notes 2) Review denial output (history/modmail)
Expected Result: Denial is recorded and notes are included in denial communication

Scenario: Username click opens user profile
Test Steps: 1) Click username link in pending card
Expected Result: User profile opens via openUserProfile flow

Scenario: Photo preview/open controls work for reviewers
Test Steps: 1) Click image thumbnail 2) Close modal 3) Click Open button
Expected Result: Modal preview and external open both work

Scenario: Rapid repeated action clicks do not double-apply
Test Steps: 1) Double-click approve/deny quickly
Expected Result: Single final state transition; no duplicate writes

Scenario: Pending list sync refreshes after action
Test Steps: 1) Approve or deny 2) Wait for patch/sync 3) Verify list
Expected Result: List updates promptly without stale duplicate item

Scenario: Block modal can be opened and canceled safely
Test Steps: 1) Click Block User 2) Click Cancel
Expected Result: Modal closes and no user is blocked

Scenario: Manual block adds user to blocked list
Test Steps: 1) Block user from modal 2) Refresh blocked list
Expected Result: User appears in blocked list with metadata

Scenario: Manual block rejects empty username
Test Steps: 1) Open block modal 2) Submit blank username
Expected Result: Validation toast shown; no backend block call

Scenario: Blocked search filters by username/reason
Test Steps: 1) Enter search text 2) Clear input
Expected Result: Results filter and reset correctly

Scenario: Remove Block unblocks user
Test Steps: 1) Click Remove Block 2) Refresh
Expected Result: User is removed from blocked list

Scenario: Auto-block occurs at denial threshold
Test Steps: 1) Deny until threshold reached 2) Check blocked list
Expected Result: User is auto-blocked when threshold is reached

Scenario: Records view loads with last 30-day date defaults
Test Steps: 1) Open History > Records 2) Check from/to dates
Expected Result: Date fields default to last 30 days

Scenario: Live search runs on username input
Test Steps: 1) Type username prefix 2) Pause for debounce
Expected Result: Results refresh automatically via live search

Scenario: Search button triggers records query
Test Steps: 1) Set username/date filters 2) Click Search
Expected Result: Results match selected filters

Scenario: Clear resets filters and repopulates default range results
Test Steps: 1) Click Clear
Expected Result: Username cleared, date reset to last 30 days, results reloaded

Scenario: Load More pages correctly without duplicates
Preconditions: More than 25 matching history records exist
Test Steps: 1) Run broad search 2) Click Load More repeatedly
Expected Result: Additional records append; no duplicate/skipped entries

Scenario: Reopen denied record creates pending re-review
Test Steps: 1) Click Reopen Verification
Expected Result: New pending re-review record appears and history item is marked reopened

Scenario: Cancel Re-review removes reopened pending child
Test Steps: 1) In Pending click Cancel Re-review
Expected Result: Reopened child is canceled and removed from pending

Scenario: Approved view defaults to last 30-day window
Test Steps: 1) Open History > Approved 2) Check date fields
Expected Result: Date fields default to last 30 days

Scenario: Empty username query shows recent approved users
Test Steps: 1) Leave username blank 2) Trigger search
Expected Result: Recent approved users are returned quickly

Scenario: 1-2 character query shows min-length hint and does not search
Test Steps: 1) Type 1-2 chars in username field
Expected Result: Hint appears: Type at least 3 characters to search; results list is cleared

Scenario: 3+ character query runs prefix search
Preconditions: Approved users exist with shared prefixes
Test Steps: 1) Type 'joh' 2) Observe results
Expected Result: Results return for usernames starting with query prefix

Scenario: Prefix search narrows as query length increases
Preconditions: Approved users include joh* and john* names
Test Steps: 1) Search 'joh' then 'john'
Expected Result: 'john' result set is subset/narrower than 'joh'

Scenario: StartsWith only (no contains) behavior
Preconditions: Data includes usernames containing term mid-string
Test Steps: 1) Search a mid-string fragment not at start
Expected Result: Usernames not starting with fragment are excluded

Scenario: Approved Clear resets to recent 30-day results
Test Steps: 1) Click Clear
Expected Result: Username cleared, hint hidden, recent 30-day approved list reloaded

Scenario: Approved Load More paginates correctly
Test Steps: 1) Search 3+ chars 2) Click Load More
Expected Result: Additional approved items append without duplicates

Scenario: Remove Verification requires reason
Test Steps: 1) Click Remove Verification with empty reason
Expected Result: Action blocked with reason-required toast

Scenario: Remove Verification with reason succeeds
Test Steps: 1) Enter reason 2) Click Remove Verification
Expected Result: Record transitions out of approved state and action is audited

Scenario: Audit view supports username filter
Test Steps: 1) Open History > Audit 2) Set username filter
Expected Result: Only matching username audit lines return

Scenario: Audit view supports actor (moderator) filter
Preconditions: Audit entries by multiple moderators exist
Test Steps: 1) Set actor filter and search
Expected Result: Only entries by specified actor return

Scenario: Audit Clear resets filters and last 30-day range
Test Steps: 1) Click Clear
Expected Result: Username/actor clear, dates reset to last 30 days, results reload

Scenario: Audit Load More paginates correctly
Test Steps: 1) Run broad audit search 2) Click Load More
Expected Result: Additional rows append without duplicates

Scenario: Key actions create audit entries
Preconditions: Perform approve, deny, reopen, remove, block, unblock
Test Steps: 1) Execute each action 2) Search audit tab
Expected Result: Each action appears with actor, line, and timestamp

Scenario: Save Verification Settings requires flair template ID
Test Steps: 1) Clear template ID 2) Click Save Verification Settings
Expected Result: Save blocked with template-required error

Scenario: Verifications enabled toggle controls submission availability
Test Steps: 1) Disable verifications and save 2) Check user submit flow 3) Re-enable
Expected Result: Users are blocked when disabled and allowed when re-enabled

Scenario: Required photo count (1/2/3) updates user submit form
Test Steps: 1) Set 1 and save 2) Open submit form 3) Repeat for 2 and 3
Expected Result: Submit form shows exactly configured number of photo fields

Scenario: Flair CSS matcher can verify user without template ID match
Preconditions: Configure css matcher that matches user flair css
Test Steps: 1) Keep template mismatch 2) Load user view
Expected Result: User status shows verified via manual path

Scenario: Status label differentiates template vs CSS verification
Preconditions: Have one template-matched and one css-only matched user
Test Steps: 1) Check status text for each
Expected Result: Template match shows 'Verified'; css-only match shows 'Verified (Manual)'

Scenario: Save modmail templates persists all template fields
Test Steps: 1) Edit subject/bodies/headers 2) Save 3) Refresh panel
Expected Result: Saved template values persist after refresh

Scenario: Placeholder substitution works in generated modmail
Test Steps: 1) Trigger pending/approve/deny/remove actions 2) Inspect modmail
Expected Result: Placeholders (username/mod/subreddit/date/reason/days) resolve correctly

Scenario: Header formatting appears in modmail messages
Test Steps: 1) Trigger approve/deny/remove 2) Inspect message body
Expected Result: Header appears at top with expected formatting

Scenario: Preset theme save persists across reload
Test Steps: 1) Select non-default preset 2) Save 3) Reload panel
Expected Result: Selected preset persists and is applied

Scenario: Custom colors save and apply when enabled
Test Steps: 1) Enable custom colors 2) Pick colors 3) Save
Expected Result: Primary/accent override applies in panel preview and live UI

Scenario: Invalid custom color values are rejected
Test Steps: 1) Submit invalid color values via devtools/input manipulation
Expected Result: Save rejects invalid hex with error

Scenario: Reset to Preset Defaults clears custom override state
Test Steps: 1) Click Reset to Preset Defaults
Expected Result: Custom color inputs disable/reset to preset-derived values

Scenario: Theme remains readable in light and dark mode
Test Steps: 1) Switch light/dark mode 2) Reload panel
Expected Result: Resolved theme tokens are readable in both modes

Scenario: History (non-approved verification records) uses fixed 180-day retention
Preconditions: Have non-approved records with known timestamps
Test Steps: 1) Verify expiry horizon 2) Access panel repeatedly
Expected Result: Expiration remains fixed at 180 days; access does not extend TTL

Scenario: Audit entries use fixed 180-day retention
Preconditions: Have audit entries with known timestamps
Test Steps: 1) Verify expiry horizon 2) Use panel heavily
Expected Result: Audit TTL remains fixed and is not extended by activity

Scenario: Approved verification retention is 365-day sliding with 24h bump throttle
Preconditions: Approved record exists; viewer can render app
Test Steps: 1) Capture TTL 2) Render as same verified user 3) Recheck within 24h and after 24h
Expected Result: TTL bumps on render at most once per 24h for that user

Scenario: Mod views do not bump TTL for other users
Preconditions: Approved record exists for another user
Test Steps: 1) Open mod panel and inspect that user record TTL before/after
Expected Result: TTL does not increase from moderator viewing alone

Scenario: Validation remains due-only and batched around 30-day cadence
Preconditions: Validation indices populated with due/non-due users
Test Steps: 1) Run scheduled validation job 2) Inspect processed users
Expected Result: Only due users are processed in capped batches; non-due users skipped

Scenario: Deleted/suspended users are purged from records and indexes
Preconditions: Create/identify deleted or suspended approved user
Test Steps: 1) Run validation on due user 2) Inspect record + indices
Expected Result: Verification record removed; approved/date/prefix/validation indices and pointers cleaned
